text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three, four! ...Huh?! Where am I? I'm
a... princess?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Princess! Focus, focus! You won't be ready in
time for the ball at this rate!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yeeees, there sure is! And the prince is coming to
meet you there. ☆

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Are you for real?! Well, now it makes sense that
I'm practicing danc—

...kami! Kawakami! Come ooon! Wake up,
already!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Are you finally awake? Hehe, you're not very
ladylike when you sleep. Who falls out of bed
during a nap?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Did I fall asleep during practice?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But there's a ball happening soon! Pearl! Let's
continue our dance practice!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Ball? Practice? I have no idea what you're going
on about...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But I can feel the fiery passion of your soul! Okay!
Let's dance!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! Nice moves! That's it! Look proud in front
of the crowd!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'll engage my prince straight on with my
supreme skill!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll make their heart pound with these spectacular
moves! Wow, I feel like this is making my legs
move faster than ever before!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Why are you dancing, Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Because there's going to be a ball! Um... I don't
remember when, though!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But I have to get ready anyway!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After this, Kawakami Princess's running form and
technique improve drastically!
